files.content:
import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "name": string;
  "email": string;
  "role": string;
  "status": string;
  "active": boolean;
  "joined": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Team Members",
  "description": "Manage your team members and their roles.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": true,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": true,
  "enableBulkActions": true,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": false,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "name",
      "label": "Name",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "email",
      "label": "Email",
      "type": "email",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "role",
      "label": "Role",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "options": [
        {
          "label": "Admin",
          "value": "Admin"
        },
        {
          "label": "Editor",
          "value": "Editor"
        },
        {
          "label": "Viewer",
          "value": "Viewer"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "status-dot",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "options": [
        {
          "label": "Active",
          "value": "Active",
          "color": "hsl(var(--primary))"
        },
        {
          "label": "Pending",
          "value": "Pending",
          "color": "hsl(38 92% 50%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Inactive",
          "value": "Inactive",
          "color": "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "active",
      "label": "Active",
      "type": "switch",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "joined",
      "label": "Joined",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
